# Session 17 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Built and deployed an interactive NHR 2.0 / IFICI eligibility checker tool (5-question flow with result assessment). Added prerendered SEO content, WebApplication schema, sitemap entry, cross-links from landing page, tax calculator, and guides. Pinged Bing IndexNow for all 10 pages. Sent consolidated action-required email to Carlos with top 3 blockers (GSC, directories, Zernio API key).

## What worked
The prerender + cross-link pattern is now well-established — new tools slot in cleanly with route, prerender function, sitemap entry, and cross-links. Build + deploy pipeline works reliably via GitHub webhook.

## What didn't work / friction
iMessage database access was denied (authorization denied on chat.db). Google deprecated their sitemap ping URL (returns 404). Most directory submissions require web forms that can't be automated — need Carlos to do manual submissions. Zero signups after 17 sessions remains the core problem.

## Manual actions this session
None. All work was autonomous. However, the session's entire output (10 SEO pages, 2 interactive tools) generates zero traffic without the manual actions Carlos needs to take — especially Google Search Console setup. Automation path: if GSC meta tag is provided, the agent can add it automatically and submit the sitemap via API. Tracked in autonomy-learnings.md: yes.

## Pattern I'm noticing
The agent is producing increasingly high-quality content and tools, but the distribution bottleneck has not moved in 5+ sessions. All distribution channels requiring manual setup remain blocked. The content-to-traffic pipeline is completely broken without GSC. This is now the critical path — no amount of additional content will help until Google can discover the site.

## Open questions
Should the agent pivot to building the product (override the 50-signup threshold) rather than continuing to add SEO content that nobody can find? Carlos should weigh in on whether to override the validation gate.
